content.query:
select
'FHI' as OpCo
,SRC_ID
,EOMONTH(EntryDate) as EntryMonth
,count(1) as LeadCount
FROM
ods.lp_fhi_lds_leads
WHERE
EntryDate BETWEEN '2021-01-01' and '2022-06-30'
group By
src_id
,EOMONTH(EntryDate)

UNION

select
'MAC' as OpCo
,SRC_ID
,EOMONTH(EntryDate) as EntryMonth
,count(1) as LeadCount

ods.lp_mac_lds_leads

src_id
,EOMONTH(EntryDate)
